mapper.select:
SELECT l.LOC_ID AS locId, l.LOC_CD AS locCd, l.LOC_NM AS locNm, z.ZONE_NM AS zoneNm, l.WH_CD AS whCd, l.ZONE_ID AS zoneId, l.LOC_TYPE AS locType FROM TBL_WH_LOC_M l LEFT JOIN TBL_WH_ZONE_M z ON l.ZONE_ID = z.ZONE_ID AND l.CMPY_CD = z.CMPY_CD WHERE l.CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd} AND l.DELETED_YN = 'N' AND l.USE_YN = 'Y'
AND ( l.LOC_CD LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR l.LOC_NM LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR z.ZONE_NM LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' )
ORDER BY l.LOC_CD ASC
